title: DC Comics Batman Lunch Bag for Kids 3D Lunch Box Boys School Lunchbag Travel Insulated Cool Bag with Drinks Holder - Fresh Hot or Cold Sandwich Box Batman Cool Bag Thermal Lunch Bag
features: 🦇 OFFICIALLY LICENSED : Batman lunch bag. We have the ultimate coolest bag for all Batman fans. This striking design is a 3d head of Batman in his mask with 3d ears. Our design has lots of added extras. Starting with a Batman logo rubber stamp zip pull, bat logo side panels and side mesh bottle holder. Match this lunch bag with our 3D Batman backpack for the ultimate set. Perfect as a gift set.

🦇 EXCLUSIVE DESIGN: These bags are an exclusive design and can only be found in our store. We have worked in collaboration with DC Comics to design this striking lunch bag. Be one of the first to own this exclusive Batman lunch bag.

🦇 GREAT MULTI-PURPOSE USE BAG: The estimated measurement of the bag is 19cm x 27cm. Big enough to store all you lunch or snacks, especially with the extra drinks holder we have on the side. They are perfect for school, nursery, play dates, picnics or camping. Our super cool design will allow your child to have a unique brand new designed bag. A perfect gift for everyone.

🦇 QUALITY MATERIALS: Each bag is made from strong, but lightweight canvas material to ensure that it is super durable while being very light. Strong enough to stand up to heavy daily use. The inner is lined with a fully wipeable and insulated material and has a small top carry handle and large adjustable shoulder strap. The bag is fastened with a strong zip and has piping around the edges for extra durability.
🦇 WONDERFUL GIFT: This strong, unique, practical lunch bag is perfect as a gift. Make sure you check out our full official Batman range.
